user.title: My Rail Commute - API Authentication
user.description:
Enter your Rail Data Marketplace API key. You can register for free at {signup_url}

Note: If you already have a commute configured, this step will be skipped automatically.

stations.title: Configure Route
stations.description: Select your origin station from the nearby stations list, or type a 3-letter CRS code directly (e.g., PAD for Paddington). Enable 'All Departures' to show every train from this station, or enter your final destination CRS code to track a specific route. If your journey needs a change of train, you'll be able to add the interchange station(s) next — Origin and Destination here stay fixed as your journey's overall start and end.

data.destination: Destination Station (CRS Code) — leave blank if 'All Departures' is enabled

add_leg.title: Add a Connecting Leg
add_leg.description:
Your journey so far: {itinerary}, travelling to {destination}.

Do you need to change trains somewhere between {current_point} and {destination}? Enter that interchange station, or continue if you travel straight through.

settings.title: Commute Settings
settings.description: Configure settings for your commute from {origin} to {destination}.

return_journey.title: Return Journey
return_journey.description: Would you also like to set up the return journey from {destination} to {origin}? It will use the same settings as this commute.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Rail API. Please try again later.
error.invalid_station: Invalid station code. Please use a valid 3-letter CRS code.
error.same_station: Origin and destination stations must be different.
error.same_as_destination: This is already your final destination — continue instead of adding it as a connecting leg.
error.invalid_thresholds: Delay thresholds must maintain hierarchy: Severe >= Major >= Minor >= 1 minute.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

error.invalid_thresholds: Delay thresholds must maintain hierarchy: Severe >= Major >= Minor >= 1 minute.
